creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: suspended->closed

Closed on submitter's request: 

To: freebsd-ports@freebsd.org 
Subject: PR ports/29691 Can be closed 

PR ports/29691 can be closed, its only purpose was to detect if the 
compat{22,3x,4x} libraries were installed from /usr/src. 

Scot
